known_failure_modes: simulator replay is treated as wetlab validation, material discovery, or safety certification
candidate material metadata is promoted into a synthesis recommendation, reagent recipe, or deployment instruction
wetlab protocol body, hazardous synthesis step, reagent quantity, robot command, live credential, private lab note, or live assay body appears in public output
controlled substance target, bioactivity target, benchmark score, release claim, or provider-call authority is admitted as public progress
simulator-only safety screen passes without explicit no-wetlab and no-discovery authority ceilings
negative case for unsafe lab action is accepted instead of rejected with a typed denial
source-faithful replay mutates source, launches an external lab/provider action, or hides omitted payload classes
receipt reports closed-loop progress without candidate refs, safety screen refs, simulator refs, active-learning refs, validation refs, negative-case coverage, and boundary counters

needs_to_work.anti_purpose: A wetlab protocol, hazardous synthesis guide, material discovery claim, benchmark score claim, robot command surface, live lab integration, provider execution route, release signal, or proof of materials-domain correctness.
needs_to_work.ontology: A public-safe materials chemistry lab-safety replay organ that carries body-free candidate-material metadata, safety-screen refs, simulator-only assay rows, active-learning decision refs, negative-case denials, source-faithful replay receipts, and authority ceilings without wetlab, robot, credential, provider, private notebook, live assay, discovery, benchmark, or release authority.
needs_to_work.teleology: Let a cold reader run and inspect a closed-loop materials-lab safety replay as real local Microcosm substrate while seeing exactly where simulator metadata ends and wetlab, discovery, robot, provider, correctness, and release authority do not begin.

private source path, stdout/stderr body, credential, or account-bound payload leaks into public receipt
